context.conversation_summary: Following Enhanced Agent System protocol (Orchestrator → Data Specialist → Memory Specialist). User requested to set Qwen 3.5 9B (lmstudio-qwen35) as default model. All other settings preserved: provider 'openai', max_tokens 128000, temperature 0.7, research_workflow loop profile. Zero regressions, configuration-only change. Picoclaw will now use Qwen 3.5 by default for all agent interactions ✅.
